name: Brevo API
what_it_does: All-in-one email and SMS marketing platform (formerly Sendinblue) with transactional email/SMS APIs, marketing campaigns, and contact management at competitive pricing.
use_cases: Sending transactional emails from agent workflows
SMS notifications triggered by agent actions
Managing marketing contact lists and campaigns via API
Email automation flows and drip campaigns
Tracking email delivery and engagement events
not_for: Ultra-high volume senders needing enterprise SLAs (consider SendGrid or Mailgun)
Teams needing advanced email template builders from code
best_when: You need a cost-effective combined transactional email + SMS + marketing API, especially for European markets.
avoid_when: You send millions of emails daily and need the most robust deliverability infrastructure.

auth.notes: Single API key in header (api-key). Simple and agent-friendly. No OAuth2 flow required.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter from $25/month for 20k emails, Business from $65/month
pricing.notes: Very competitive pricing for email volume. SMS priced separately by country. No per-contact pricing on most plans unlike Mailchimp.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Standard REST error responses with code and message fields. Documentation is adequate but not exceptional.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No idempotency keys. Retry may result in duplicate sends. Agent must track send state.
known_agent_gotchas: No idempotency keys for transactional sends - retries may duplicate emails
Free tier 300/day limit is per calendar day UTC
Domain authentication (DKIM/SPF) required for good deliverability
SMS credits purchased separately and not part of email plan
Contact import via API has rate limits that can surprise agents doing bulk operations

security_score_components.security_notes: Email/SMS marketing API (formerly Sendinblue). API key auth. Sending emails at scale — protect from misuse. GDPR contact management built-in. Unsubscribe handling required.
